creator: dindin@FreeBSD.org.ua
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Good day, Martin.

I think this patch is solution.

Best regards, Denis Barov.
dindin@freebsd.org,ua



- ---- Patch Begins ----
diff -urN files/patch-Makefile.in.orig files/patch-Makefile.in
- --- files/patch-Makefile.in.orig    Mon Dec 25 12:28:12 2006
+++ files/patch-Makefile.in Mon Dec 25 12:26:25 2006
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
- ---- Makefile.in.orig   Mon Apr 17 08:51:33 2006
- -+++ Makefile.in    Thu Dec 21 17:40:00 2006
+--- Makefile.in.orig   Mon Dec 25 11:22:30 2006
++++ Makefile.in    Mon Dec 25 11:23:23 2006
 @@ -201,12 +201,11 @@
        echo "move old sams.conf to sams.conf.old"; \
        mv /etc/sams.conf /etc/sams.conf.old; \
@@ -14,3 +14,14 @@
    cp ./mysql/recover_admin_passwd $(bindir);
    -@if test ! -d $(datadir); then \
        echo "creating $(datadir)"; \
+@@ -235,10 +234,6 @@
+   chmod 777 $(datadir)/sams/data;
+   rm -f $(datadir)/sams/data/*;
+   cp -R doc $(datadir)/sams/;
+-  -@if test ! -d $(HTTPDPATH)/sams; then \
+-      echo "creating symlink to sams directory"; \
+-      ln -s $(datadir)/sams $(HTTPDPATH)/sams; \
+-  fi
+
+ uninstall-binPROGRAMS:
+   rm $(bindir)/sams;
diff -urN sams/pkg-plist.orig sams/pkg-plist
- --- sams/pkg-plist.orig Mon Dec 25 12:28:12 2006
+++ sams/pkg-plist  Mon Dec 25 11:26:40 2006
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 bin/samsf
 bin/samsredir
 etc/rc.d/sams
+etc/sams.conf.sample
 share/nls/POSIX
 share/nls/en_US.US-ASCII
 share/sams/admin.php
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----
